name: Wang Yi
role: Foreign Minister of China; Director of the CCP Central Foreign Affairs Commission Office
bio: Veteran Chinese diplomat who has served as Foreign Minister and senior foreign-policy chief across multiple administrations. Wang has become Beijing's principal interlocutor on Iran, Ukraine, and US-China relations during the 2026 multipolar diplomatic cycle.

quotes.text: China calls for a comprehensive ceasefire and the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz; the parties should not let this diplomatic window close.
